title_original: Projekt ORION: Umetna inteligenca za varno mejno kontrolo
title_en_gloss: Project ORION: Artificial intelligence for safe border control
current_claim_ceiling: The Slovenian police page, the EU CORDIS fact sheet, the public ORION project website, the UIC public launch/website notices, and two public ORION PDF documents (a 2026-05 brochure and a 2026-05 roll-up) now support narrow claims about project identity, Horizon funding/grant metadata, AI-assisted border-management framing, privacy-preserving and advanced-biometric language, named solution modules (remote biometric enrolment / in-vehicle verification, morphing-attack detection, portable X-ray screening, vehicle visual recognition / anomaly detection, AI-driven risk assessment, queue management, privacy-preserving fuzzy search, and explainable-AI decision support), and four pilot/use-case settings across Slovenia, Romania, the United Kingdom, and Bulgaria. verification_route: Treat the police page, CORDIS fact sheet, UIC directory/articles, ORION project website, and public flyer as the current ORION front door; only a document-grade procurement/register/technical, audit, evaluation, or court-facing public document should count as the next threshold gain.

title_original: Pri Sveti Trojici namesto tajnice (že) umetna inteligenca
title_en_gloss: In Sveta Trojica, artificial intelligence already stands in for a secretary
current_claim_ceiling: Direct Radio Ptuj article text supports a narrow claim that the mayor of the Municipality of Sveta Trojica publicly announced an AI-assisted municipal-secretariat phone agent named Klara that answers calls naturally, recognizes the content of a call, and routes callers to the competent office; the article also says the municipality describes itself as among the first in Slovenia to introduce such a solution in everyday municipal-administration work. Stronger claims about full human replacement, the exact vendor/technical stack, legality, effectiveness, procurement process, or whether any human fallback remains behind the phone channel still require direct municipal documentation and human review.
priority_rationale: Still the best multilingual weird-case candidate for bounded appendix/table use, but the municipal route is now bounded on two fronts: both Sveta Trojica municipal domain variants currently return the same HTTP 403 shell at root, robots, sitemap, and API entry points, while the reachable EJN public procurement search returns explicit zero states for the bounded Sveta Trojica / Klara query set. The row therefore remains a strong local-news exemplar rather than a newly corroborated official or procurement-backed municipal record.
paper_use_now: Reviewer-safe institutional-absurdity / public-administration appendix row with explicit claim ceiling; methods note on upgrading an open regional-radio lead into a direct-source-resolved municipal-service-channel record; cautious comparator for AI theater versus actual workflow substitution.
observatory_hook: Institutional absurdity queue; municipal service-channel map; authority-weighted lead-to-direct-source upgrade funnel; public-administration phone-routing comparison.
claim_support_use: The direct article supports narrow descriptive claims that the Municipality of Sveta Trojica introduced an AI-assisted phone-answering / routing channel branded as secretary Klara and that the mayor frames it as an early Slovenian municipal-administration adoption; it does not by itself support claims about actual staffing replacement, measured service improvement, legality, or wider municipal diffusion.
verification_route: Use the resolved Radio Ptuj article for bounded extraction now. Treat the Municipality of Sveta Trojica domains as currently blocked across root, robots, sitemap, and API entry points from this shell context, and treat the reachable EJN public procurement search as an explicit zero-state across `Sveta Trojica`, `Klara`, `umetna inteligenca`, `David Klobasa`, and `tajnice`; only a genuinely different municipal/procurement/council-document or browser/human route should count as progress.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Preserve the row as a bounded local-news-led municipal-service anomaly until one genuinely different municipal/council-document route or later buyer/procurement companion appears; do not replay the same municipal root probes or EJN query set unchanged.
provenance_note: Ranked and route-coded during hostile-reviewer publication sprint. Live bounded access checks on 2026-06-08 found both Sveta Trojica municipal domain variants returning the same HTTP 403 shell at root, robots, sitemap, and API entry points, while the reachable EJN public procurement search returned explicit `0 rezultatov iskanja` states for `Sveta Trojica`, `Klara`, `umetna inteligenca`, `David Klobasa`, and `tajnice`. This preserves the row as direct local-news evidence plus bounded official/procurement non-recovery rather than official corroboration.
ai_use_phrase: oglaša njihova nova tajnica Klara, ki deluje ob pomoči umetne inteligence
next_threshold_event: MTPR-003: one genuinely different Sveta Trojica municipal/public-document route resolves despite the current 403 portal wall
threshold_gain_if_hit: Distinguish announced AI-assisted municipal call routing from stronger labor-replacement rhetoric with one direct municipal companion.
